text: Stepping from the clean, almost clinical corridors into this vibrant and thought-provoking space, I’m struck by a sense of transition—moving from structure into the unpredictable territory of ideas. The bold R+D wall and the thoughtful words displayed make me feel quietly inspired yet reflective. I sense a kind of anticipation, as if the environment itself is nudging me to question, imagine, and engage. There’s a gentle optimism and a call to be open to new possibilities here; I feel like both an observer and a participant in an ongoing dialogue about knowledge, creation, and our place in the world.
